data.body: Fix applied: (1) using-lockpick/SKILL.md — added injection verification + silent failure fallback + terse-string detection. (2) HOOK-INJECTION.md — same changes for consistency. (3) sprint/SKILL.md — added INJECTION_GUARD block after SUB-AGENT-GUARD. Also covers 2a75-5e96 (Launching skill terse string case).
